title: SENTINEL APEX — Exploit for CVE-2026-48908
id: cd0c6b84-e1d3-576b-ba66-349cb25e9e30
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-48908 (Web Application).

    Severity: LOW | Class: GENERIC
references:

author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/22
modified: 2026/06/22
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: low
kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-48908 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-22T10:46:34Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-48908", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-48908 Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:1853543; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-22, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

title: CVE-2025-66336: Apache Doris MCP Server: SQL injection leading the authentication bypass
description:
Posted by Calvin Kirs on Jun 21 Severity: important 
 
Affected versions: 
 
- Apache Doris MCP Server 0.1.0 before 0.6.1 
 
Description: 
 
Apache Doris MCP Server contains a SQL injection vulnerability in a metadata query path. A user-controlled database 
name is directly interpolated into a SQL query, and the query is executed without passing the caller's authorization 
context. This may allow an authenticated attacker, or an anonymous attacker if authentication is disabled,...

title: SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2025-66336 Apache Doris MCP Server SQL injection leading the authentication 
id: a9a0a717-d481-59dd-9a43-dee49e719ad9
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2025-66336 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: MEDIUM | Class: SQLI
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-66336
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/22
modified: 2026/06/22
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: webserver
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        cs-uri-query|contains:
            - "' OR 1=1"
            - "UNION SELECT"
            - "'; DROP TABLE"
            - "1=1--"
            - "benchmark("
            - "sleep("
            - "0x"
        sc-status|contains: '500'
    filter_legitimate:
        cs-uri-stem|startswith: '/api/search'
    condition: selection and not filter_legitimate
falsepositives:
    - Web application firewall test traffic
    - Vulnerability scanner activity
level: medium
kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2025-66336 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-22T10:46:34Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2025-66336", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2025-66336 Exploitation Attempt - SQLI"; flow:established,to_server; content:"UNION SELECT"; nocase; content:"--"; distance:0; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:2836809; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-22, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

The application, which typically operates with high-level system privileges, attempts to perform an internal validation check by invoking a secondary system utility using an unqualified file reference.

title: U.S. CISA adds Splunk Enterprise flaw to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog and urges agencies to fix it by Sunday
description: U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) adds Splunk Enterprise flaw to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog. The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) added a Splunk Enterprise flaw, tracked as CVE-2026-20253 (CVSS score of 9.8), to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog. The flaw CVE-2026-20253 is an improper authentication vulnerability in the PostgreSQL sidecar service of […]
confidence_rationale: Intelligence confirmed: Item is listed in CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities; CVSS score 9.8 (Critical); EPSS score 10.040 (very high exploitation probability)

Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
